feed.title: Hearing Hearings
feed.subtitle: Summaries and transcripts of New York City Council hearings.

entry.title: Committee on General Welfare, Food Insecurity in NYC
entry.summary: The General Welfare Committee held a comprehensive hearing on food insecurity and related legislation, revealing the persistent challenge of feeding New...

entry.title: Committee on Public Housing, Oversight - Security Measures for NYCHA’s Vacant Apartments
entry.summary: The Public Housing Committee held an oversight hearing on security measures for NYCHA's vacant apartments, focusing on a Department of Investigation report...

entry.title: Committee on Sanitation and Solid Waste Management, Finalizing the City's Draft 2026-2036 Solid Waste Management Plan
entry.summary: The Committee on Sanitation and Solid Waste Management held an extensive oversight hearing on finalizing the City's Draft 2026-2036 Solid Waste Management...

entry.title: Committee on Finance, FY 2027 Preliminary Budget Hearing
entry.summary: The Finance Committee held its preliminary budget hearing for fiscal year 2027, with OMB Director Solomon defending a $127 billion budget that includes a...

entry.title: Committee on Land Use, FY 2027 Preliminary Budget Hearing
entry.summary: The City Council Land Use Committee held budget hearings on the Department of City Planning's fiscal 2027 preliminary budget and capital plan. Commissioner Dan...

entry.title: Committee on Aging, FY 2027 Preliminary Budget Hearing
entry.summary: The Committee on Aging held its preliminary budget hearing for FY2027, featuring a new 9-day Commissioner Dr. Lisa Scott McKenzie defending a $573.5 million...

entry.title: Committee on Housing and Buildings, Preserving Affordable Housing in Distress and the Third-Party Transfer Program
entry.summary: The Housing and Buildings Committee held an oversight hearing on preserving affordable housing in distress and Int 0657-2026, known as the Safer Homes Act,...

entry.title: Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure, Assessing the State of the NYC Streets Plan in 2026
entry.summary: The Transportation and Infrastructure Committee held its oversight hearing on the Streets Plan, revealing a sobering pattern of the city's failure to meet...

entry.title: Committee on Hospitals, Impacts of the Maimonides Health System and NYC H+H Merger
entry.summary: The Committee on Hospitals held an oversight hearing on the proposed merger between NYC Health + Hospitals H+H and Maimonides Health System, scheduled to close...

entry.title: Committee on Housing and Buildings, Oversight - Shared Housing in NYC
entry.summary: The Housing and Buildings Committee held an oversight hearing on shared housing in NYC and reviewed six pieces of legislation addressing various housing and...
